tiers.description: Simple, single-purpose sites that prove core importer stability.
tiers.prompt_guidance: Prefer simple static structure, common Gutenberg-compatible sections, low animation, and minimal bespoke interaction.

tiers.description: Moderate compositions with richer section variety once foundation quality is stable.
tiers.prompt_guidance: Use moderate visual variety, nested section rhythm, richer metadata, and two to four reusable component patterns while keeping importability first.

tiers.description: Higher-variance prompts that deliberately exercise importer edges after composed quality holds.
tiers.prompt_guidance: Increase layout variety and content density, include one importer-edge pattern, and keep all randomness recorded in candidate metadata.

steady.description: Low variance; deterministic enough for stable importer proof.

varied.description: Moderate variance across kind, layout, palette, and content theme.

exploratory.description: Higher variance for stress prompts after recent quality is stable.
